case_title: GINGMON RANDOLPH VS. YUEN LAN MA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RANDOLPH, GINGMON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY RANDOLPH, GINGMON AS TO DEFENDANT MA, YUEN LAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND". (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RANDOLPH, GINGMON AS TO DEFENDANT MA, YUEN LAN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
